title: Header Fields, Representations, Negotiation, Validators, and Caching · Language Lens: Header Multivalue Canonicalization
summary: Clients send repeated and malformed media fields, the server sniffs content, omits Vary, caches personalized responses, and computes validators from unstable JSON ordering. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo header multivalue canonicalization increment in representation selection and cache contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle case-insensitive field names, repeated values, list syntax, hop-by-hop fields, size limits, and canonical map behavior without naïve splitting.
Record low-cardinality route, request ID, trusted peer, and redacted target evidence without logging credentials, tokens, or personal data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
